title: Heartbreak Hotel
why_this_song: Heartbreak Hotel by Elvis Presley (1956) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh, and although it's always crowded
You still can find some room
To cry there in their gloom
They'll get so lonely, they could die
Well, now, if your baby leaves you

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lonely" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lonely" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "well" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "well" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, since my baby left me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, I found a new place to dwell

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Heartbreak Hotel" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Heartbreak Hotel" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Heartbreak Hotel", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Heartbreak Hotel", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Heartbreak Hotel" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Heartbreak Hotel" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
